inputs.name: checkBy
inputs.description: Property name or accessor used to derive a node's check key from its data. Falls back to the node's data when unset.

inputs.name: checkedKeys
inputs.description: Keys of the currently checked nodes.

inputs.name: checkedKeysChange
inputs.description: Emitted when the checked keys change.

inputs.name: hasCheckbox
inputs.description: Predicate that determines whether a node displays a checkbox. When unset, every node displays a checkbox.

inputs.name: nodeCheck
inputs.description: Emitted when a node is checked or unchecked.

inputs.name: options
inputs.description: Configures check mode and whether checking a node also checks its children or parents. Merged over `{ checkChildren: true, checkParents: true, enabled: true, mode: "multiple" }` when applied bare.

inputs.name: disableBy
inputs.description: Property name or accessor used to derive a node's disable key from its data. Falls back to the node's data when unset.

inputs.name: disabledKeys
inputs.description: Keys of the currently disabled nodes.

inputs.name: options
inputs.description: Configures whether disabling a node also disables its children. Merged over `{ disableChildren: true, enabled: true }` when applied bare.

inputs.name: nodeDrag
inputs.description: Emitted while a node is being dragged.

inputs.name: nodeDragEnd
inputs.description: Emitted when a node drag ends.

inputs.name: nodeDragStart
inputs.description: Emitted when a node drag starts.

inputs.name: nodeDrop
inputs.description: Emitted when a node is dropped.

inputs.name: options
inputs.description: Configures whether dragging nodes to reorder or reparent them is enabled. Merged over `{ enabled: true }` when applied bare.

inputs.name: collapse
inputs.description: Emitted when a node is collapsed.

inputs.name: expand
inputs.description: Emitted when a node is expanded.

inputs.name: expandBy
inputs.description: Property name or accessor used to derive a node's expand key from its data. Falls back to the node's data when unset.

inputs.name: expandedKeys
inputs.description: Keys of the currently expanded nodes.

inputs.name: expandedKeysChange
inputs.description: Emitted when the expanded keys change.

inputs.name: options
inputs.description: Configures whether expanding and collapsing nodes is enabled. Merged over `{ enabled: true }` when applied bare.

inputs.name: filter
inputs.description: Current filter text used to narrow the visible nodes.

inputs.name: filterChange
inputs.description: Emitted when the filter value changes.

inputs.name: filterPlaceholder
inputs.description: Placeholder text shown in the filter input.

inputs.name: options
inputs.description: Configures the filter operator, case sensitivity, and debounce delay. Merged over `{ enabled: true, operator: "contains", caseSensitive: false, debounce: 0 }` when applied bare.

inputs.name: nodeSelect
inputs.description: Emitted when a node is selected or deselected.

inputs.name: selectBy
inputs.description: Property name or accessor used to derive a node's selection key from its data. Falls back to the node's data when unset.

inputs.name: selectedKeys
inputs.description: Keys of the currently selected nodes.

inputs.name: selectedKeysChange
inputs.description: Emitted when the selected keys change.

inputs.name: selectionChange
inputs.description: Emitted when the selection changes.

inputs.name: options
inputs.description: Configures selection mode, toggleability, and whether only child nodes are selectable. Merged over `{ childrenOnly: false, enabled: true, mode: "single", toggleable: false }` when applied bare.

inputs.name: ariaHasPopup
inputs.description:
Value forwarded to the `aria-haspopup` attribute. Set when this button triggers a popup, menu,
listbox, tree, grid, or dialog. Omit or leave as `"false"` for plain action buttons.

inputs.name: disabled
inputs.description:
Renders the component with reduced visual emphasis and removes pointer interaction.
When inside a `ButtonGroup`, the group's disabled state takes precedence.

inputs.name: iconOnly
inputs.description:
Removes horizontal padding and fixes a square aspect ratio sized to match `size`.
Provide `aria-label` on the host when using icon-only buttons.

inputs.name: loading
inputs.description:
Displays a loading indicator and prevents interaction while an operation is in progress.
Sets `aria-busy="true"` on the host.

inputs.name: look
inputs.description: Visual style variant of the button. When inside a `ButtonGroup`, the group's look takes precedence.

inputs.name: rounded
inputs.description:
Border-radius preset applied to the component.
When inside a `ButtonGroup`, the group's value takes precedence.

inputs.name: selected
inputs.description:
Whether the button is in the selected/pressed state. Drives `aria-pressed` when the button is toggleable.
Managed by `toggleable` click handling or by `ButtonGroup` selection policy.

inputs.name: size
inputs.description:
Size preset controlling the button's height and horizontal padding.
When inside a `ButtonGroup`, the group's value takes precedence.

inputs.name: tabindex
inputs.description:
Tab index of the host element. Automatically overridden to `-1` when the button is disabled or loading.
Accepts a numeric string and converts it to a number.

inputs.name: toggleable
inputs.description:
Enables toggle behavior — each click flips the `selected` state and `aria-pressed` is managed.
Must use `[toggleable]="true"` binding syntax, not bare attribute form.

inputs.name: userClass
inputs.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the host element via `tailwind-merge`.

inputs.name: ariaLabel
inputs.description:
Accessible name for the host element. Describe what the chip represents.
When empty, assistive technology announces the role without a label.

inputs.name: contentClick
inputs.description:
Emitted when the chip body is clicked or activated via Enter or Space.
Not emitted when the remove button is activated.

inputs.name: disabled
inputs.description: Renders the chip with reduced visual emphasis and removes pointer interaction.

inputs.name: label
inputs.description: Text label displayed inside the chip. When non-empty, takes precedence over projected content.

inputs.name: look
inputs.description: Visual style variant controlling the chip's background color, border, and interaction states.

inputs.name: removable
inputs.description: Renders a remove button inside the chip. When activated, emits the `remove` output.

inputs.name: remove
inputs.description:
Emitted when the remove button is clicked. Only fires when `removable` is `true`.
Emits the originating `Event`.

inputs.name: removeLabel
inputs.description:
Accessible label for the remove button, overriding the auto-computed `"Remove, <label>"` fallback.
Use when the chip shows only projected content and the default label is not descriptive enough.

inputs.name: removeTabIndex
inputs.description:
Tab index for the remove button, independent of the chip host's own tabindex.
Set to `-1` to exclude the remove button from tab order when an equivalent keyboard path exists elsewhere.

inputs.name: rounded
inputs.description: Border-radius preset applied to the chip.

inputs.name: selected
inputs.description:
Whether the chip is selected. When `toggleable` is `true`, each activation flips this value.
Supports two-way binding via `[(selected)]`.

inputs.name: size
inputs.description: Size preset controlling the chip's padding and remove button dimensions.

inputs.name: tabindex
inputs.description:
Tab index override for the chip host element. When not set, computed automatically:
`0` when `toggleable` or `removable` is `true`, `-1` otherwise. Overridden to `-1` when `disabled` is `true`.

inputs.name: toggleable
inputs.description:
Enables toggle behavior. When `true`, each activation flips `selected`
and the host receives `role="checkbox"` with `aria-checked`.

inputs.name: userClass
inputs.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the host element via `tailwind-merge`.

inputs.name: value
inputs.description:
Arbitrary value associated with this chip.
Useful for identifying which chip was selected or removed in a collection.

inputs.name: tagCount
inputs.description:
Number of selected item tags to display before collapsing the rest into a summary tag.
A negative value shows every selected item as its own tag and never renders the summary tag.

inputs.name: rounded
inputs.description: Border-radius preset applied to the checkbox.

inputs.name: userClass
inputs.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the host element via `tailwind-merge`.

inputs.name: rounded
inputs.description: Sets the border radius of the radio button.

inputs.name: rounded
inputs.description: Sets the border radius of the textarea.

inputs.name: invalid
inputs.description: Marks the textarea as invalid, triggering error border and ring styling.

inputs.name: touched
inputs.description: Marks the textarea as touched. Error styling is only shown when both `invalid` and `touched` are `true`.

inputs.name: userClass
inputs.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the host element via `tailwind-merge`.

inputs.name: rounded
inputs.description: Border-radius preset applied to the component.

inputs.name: size
inputs.description: Size preset controlling the component's dimensions.

inputs.name: userClass
inputs.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the host element via `tailwind-merge`.

inputs.name: actionClick
inputs.description: Emitted when a toolbar action button is clicked, carrying the action's details.

inputs.name: ariaLabel
inputs.description:
Accessible name for the list box's `listbox` element. Describe what the list represents,
which matters in particular when connecting two list boxes.

inputs.name: connectedList
inputs.description: The other list box to transfer items to and from using the toolbar actions.

inputs.name: height
inputs.description: Sets the height of the component.

inputs.name: items
inputs.description: Collection of items to render.

inputs.name: rounded
inputs.description: Border-radius preset applied to the component.

inputs.name: selectBy
inputs.description: Property name or accessor used to derive the key from a data item, used to identify selected items.

inputs.name: selectedKeys
inputs.description: Keys of the currently selected items.

inputs.name: selectedKeysChange
inputs.description: Emitted with the updated keys whenever the selection changes.

inputs.name: selectionChange
inputs.description: Emitted with the selected and deselected items whenever the selection changes.

inputs.name: selectionMode
inputs.description: Allows multiple items to be selected simultaneously when set to `"multiple"`.

inputs.name: singleSelectionToggleable
inputs.description:
Allows an already-selected item to be deselected by clicking it again while `selectionMode`
is `"single"`. Has no effect when `selectionMode` is `"multiple"`.

inputs.name: size
inputs.description: Size preset controlling the component's dimensions.

inputs.name: textField
inputs.description: Property name or accessor used to derive the display text from a data item.

inputs.name: toolbar
inputs.description:
Shows the action toolbar. Pass `false` to hide it entirely, or an options object to customize
which actions are shown and where the toolbar is positioned.

inputs.name: width
inputs.description: Sets the width of the component.

inputs.name: ariaLabel
inputs.description: Accessible name for the list view's `listbox` element. Describe what the list represents.

inputs.name: height
inputs.description: Sets the height of the list view.

inputs.name: listClass
inputs.description: Sets the classes of the inner UL element.

inputs.name: listItemClass
inputs.description: Sets the classes of the list items.

inputs.name: listItemStyle
inputs.description: Sets the style of the list items.

inputs.name: listStyle
inputs.description: Sets the style of the list.

inputs.name: items
inputs.description: Collection of items to render.

inputs.name: maxHeight
inputs.description: Sets the maximum height of the list.

inputs.name: maxWidth
inputs.description: Sets the maximum width of the list.

inputs.name: rounded
inputs.description: Border-radius preset applied to the component.

inputs.name: scrollBottom
inputs.description: Emitted when the list is scrolled to the bottom.

inputs.name: size
inputs.description: Size preset controlling the component's dimensions.

inputs.name: textField
inputs.description: Property name or accessor used to derive the display text from a data item.

inputs.name: userClass
inputs.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the host element via `tailwind-merge`.

inputs.name: width
inputs.description: Sets the width of the list view.

inputs.name: disabled
inputs.description: Renders this item with reduced visual emphasis and removes pointer interaction.

inputs.name: listDisabled
inputs.description: Reflects whether the parent breadcrumb is disabled. Controls compound disabled styling when only individual items are disabled.

inputs.name: userClass
inputs.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the breadcrumb item via `tailwind-merge`.

inputs.name: firstLast
inputs.description: Shows the first and last page navigation buttons.

inputs.name: navigable
inputs.description: Enables keyboard navigation on the pager wrapper and its inner controls.

inputs.name: pageChange
inputs.description: Emitted when the current page changes.

inputs.name: pageInput
inputs.description: Shows a numeric input for jumping directly to a page.

inputs.name: pageSize
inputs.description: Number of items displayed per page.

inputs.name: pageSizeChange
inputs.description: Emitted when the page size changes. Cancelable via `preventDefault()` on the event.

inputs.name: pageSizeValues
inputs.description: Page-size options shown in the page-size dropdown. Set to `false` or an empty array to hide the dropdown.

inputs.name: previousNext
inputs.description: Shows the previous and next page navigation buttons.

inputs.name: responsive
inputs.description: Collapses sections of the pager as the host element narrows.

inputs.name: rounded
inputs.description: Border-radius preset applied to the component.

inputs.name: showInfo
inputs.description: Displays the summary of the current page range and total item count.

inputs.name: size
inputs.description: Size preset controlling the component's dimensions.

inputs.name: skip
inputs.description: Number of items to skip before the current page. Determines the current page together with `pageSize`.

inputs.name: total
inputs.description: Total number of items in the paged collection.

inputs.name: type
inputs.description: Visual mode of the pager: numeric page buttons, or a page-jump input.

inputs.name: userClasses
inputs.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the host element via `tailwind-merge`.

inputs.name: visiblePages
inputs.description: Number of numeric page buttons shown at once before collapsing into jump controls.

inputs.name: anchor
inputs.description: The anchor element or point for the popup.

inputs.name: anchorConnectionPoint
inputs.description: The connection point for the popup anchor.

inputs.name: animation
inputs.description: The animation settings for the popup.

inputs.name: backdropClass
inputs.description: The class or classes to apply to the backdrop of the popup.

inputs.name: close
inputs.description: Emits when the popup is closed.

inputs.name: closeOnBackdropClick
inputs.description:
Whether to close the popup when clicking on the backdrop.
Only applies when the popup has a backdrop.

inputs.name: closeOnEscape
inputs.description: Whether to close the popup when the escape key is pressed.

inputs.name: closeOnMouseLeave
inputs.description: Whether to close the popup when the mouse leaves the anchor element.

inputs.name: closeOnOutsideClick
inputs.description: Whether to close the popup when clicking outside of it.

inputs.name: data
inputs.description: Arbitrary data to pass to the popup.

inputs.name: hasBackdrop
inputs.description: Whether the popup should have a backdrop.

inputs.name: height
inputs.description: The height of the popup.

inputs.name: maxHeight
inputs.description: The maximum height of the popup.

inputs.name: maxWidth
inputs.description: The maximum width of the popup.

inputs.name: minHeight
inputs.description: The minimum height of the popup.

inputs.name: minWidth
inputs.description: The minimum width of the popup.

inputs.name: offset
inputs.description: The offset of the popup from the anchor.

inputs.name: open
inputs.description: Emits when the popup is opened.

inputs.name: popupClass
inputs.description: The class or classes to apply to the popup.

inputs.name: popupConnectionPoint
inputs.description: The connection point for the popup.

inputs.name: popupWrapperClass
inputs.description: The class or classes to apply to the popup wrapper.

inputs.name: positionStrategy
inputs.description:
The strategy for positioning the popup.
`global` means the popup will be positioned relative to the viewport,
`connected` means the popup will be positioned relative to the anchor element.

inputs.name: positions
inputs.description:
The positions to use for the popup.
The popup will try to position itself in the first position that fits.
This is only used when the `positionStrategy` is set to `connected`.

inputs.name: preventClose
inputs.description:
Called when the popup is requested to close.
This can be used to prevent the popup from closing.

inputs.name: providers
inputs.description: The providers that will be injected into the popup.

inputs.name: trigger
inputs.description: The trigger event for opening the popup.

inputs.name: width
inputs.description: The width of the popup.

inputs.name: withPush
inputs.description: Whether to push the popup into the screen when it is opened.

inputs.name: closeOnScroll
inputs.description: Whether to close the popup when the user scrolls within a scrollable container.

inputs.name: restoreFocus
inputs.description:
Controls focus restoration when the popup closes.
- `true`: always restore focus to the anchor element.
- `false`: never restore focus (recommended for tooltips).
- `"auto"`: restore focus only if the anchor was focused when the popup opened.

inputs.name: withScrollTracking
inputs.description: Whether the popup should track scroll events and reposition itself.

inputs.name: disabled
inputs.description: Whether the tooltip is disabled. When disabled, the tooltip will not be shown.

inputs.name: filter
inputs.description:
The filter to select elements that will have tooltips.
It can be a CSS selector that matches elements within the host element.
Only applies when `mode` is set to `content`.

inputs.name: hideDelay
inputs.description: The delay in milliseconds before hiding the tooltip.

inputs.name: mode
inputs.description:
The mode of the tooltip.
"host" mode receives the tooltip from the host element's title attribute.
"content" mode uses the title attribute of elements matching the filter.

inputs.name: position
inputs.description: The position of the tooltip relative to the target element.

inputs.name: rounded
inputs.description: The border radius of the tooltip.

inputs.name: showDelay
inputs.description: The delay in milliseconds before showing the tooltip after the trigger event.

inputs.name: hidden
inputs.description: Emitted when the tooltip popup is hidden.

inputs.name: shown
inputs.description: Emitted when the tooltip popup is shown.

inputs.name: content
inputs.description: The text content displayed in the tooltip.

inputs.name: position
inputs.description: The position of the tooltip relative to the target element.

inputs.name: rounded
inputs.description: The border radius of the tooltip.

inputs.name: tooltipId
inputs.description: The unique id for the tooltip element, used for aria-describedby linkage.

inputs.name: animate
inputs.description: Enables CSS transitions when nodes expand or collapse.

inputs.name: ariaLabel
inputs.description: Accessible name for the tree. Describe what the tree represents. When empty, assistive technology announces the role without a label.

inputs.name: children
inputs.description: Property name or accessor used to derive a node's children from a data item. Accepts a property name, a function returning the children, or a function returning an observable of the children.

inputs.name: data
inputs.description: Collection of items to render.

inputs.name: hasChildren
inputs.description: Predicate that determines whether a node has children. Required when the children selector returns an observable.

inputs.name: idField
inputs.description: Property name that holds a node's unique identifier. Required when `mode` is set to `"flat"`.

inputs.name: mode
inputs.description: Shape of the source data: `"hierarchical"` for nested items via `children`, or `"flat"` for a flat list linked by `idField` and `parentIdField`.

inputs.name: blur
inputs.description: Emitted when the tree-view loses focus.

inputs.name: focus
inputs.description: Emitted when the tree-view gains focus.

inputs.name: nodeClick
inputs.description: Emitted when a node is clicked.

inputs.name: parentIdField
inputs.description: Property name that holds a node's parent identifier. Required when `mode` is set to `"flat"`.

inputs.name: textField
inputs.description: Property name or accessor used to derive the display text from a data item.

inputs.name: allowEmpty
inputs.description:
When `false` and `selection` is `"single"`, at least one button must remain selected;
the active button cannot be deselected. Has no effect in `"multiple"` mode.

inputs.name: ariaLabel
inputs.description:
Accessible name for the host element. Override when multiple button groups appear on the same page
so screen reader users can distinguish them.

inputs.name: disabled
inputs.description: Renders all child buttons with reduced visual emphasis and removes pointer interaction.

inputs.name: look
inputs.description:
Visual style variant propagated to all child buttons.
Also controls container-level divider and border behavior.

inputs.name: rounded
inputs.description: Border-radius preset applied to the container and the outer corners of the first and last child button.

inputs.name: selection
inputs.description:
Two-way bindable. Controls whether child buttons behave as a radio group (`"single"`)
or toggle independently (`"multiple"`).

inputs.name: size
inputs.description: Size preset propagated to all child buttons, overriding their individual `size` inputs.

inputs.name: userClass
inputs.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the host element via `tailwind-merge`.

inputs.name: disabled
inputs.description: Sets the disabled state of the calendar.

inputs.name: disabledDates
inputs.description:
Sets the disabled dates of the calendar.
Accepts either an iterable of Date objects or a predicate function.

inputs.name: firstDay
inputs.description: Sets the first day of the week.

inputs.name: invalid
inputs.description:
Marks the calendar as invalid. When bound to a signal form field via `[formField]`,
this is written by the `FormField` directive.

inputs.name: maxDate
inputs.description: Sets the maximum date that can be selected.

inputs.name: minDate
inputs.description: Sets the minimum date that can be selected.

inputs.name: readonly
inputs.description: Sets the readonly state of the calendar.

inputs.name: rounded
inputs.description: Sets the border radius of the calendar.

inputs.name: selection
inputs.description: Sets the selection mode of the calendar.

inputs.name: touch
inputs.description:
Emitted when the calendar value is changed by user interaction.
The `FormField` directive listens to this to mark the field as touched.

inputs.name: required
inputs.description:
Sets whether the calendar is required. When bound to a signal form field via `[formField]`,
this is written by the `FormField` directive.

inputs.name: touched
inputs.description:
Sets the touched state of the calendar. When bound to a signal form field via `[formField]`,
this is written by the `FormField` directive.

inputs.name: userClass
inputs.description: Adds custom CSS classes to the calendar host element.

inputs.name: value
inputs.description: The current value of the calendar.

inputs.name: weekNumber
inputs.description: Enables the display of week numbers in the calendar.

inputs.name: close
inputs.description: Emits when the popup is about to close. This event is preventable.

inputs.name: closed
inputs.description: Emits after the popup is closed.

inputs.name: disabled
inputs.description: Sets the disabled state of the date picker.

inputs.name: disabledDates
inputs.description:
Sets the disabled dates of the date picker.
Accepts either an iterable of Date objects or a predicate function.

inputs.name: firstDay
inputs.description: Sets the first day of the week.

inputs.name: format
inputs.description: Sets the date format of the date picker.

inputs.name: invalid
inputs.description:
Marks the date picker as invalid. When bound to a signal form field via `[formField]`,
this is written by the `FormField` directive.

inputs.name: max
inputs.description: Sets the maximum date of the date picker.

inputs.name: min
inputs.description: Sets the minimum date of the date picker.

inputs.name: open
inputs.description: Emits when the popup is about to open. This event is preventable.

inputs.name: opened
inputs.description: Emits after the popup is opened.

inputs.name: placeholder
inputs.description: Sets the placeholder of the date picker.

inputs.name: popupClass
inputs.description: Sets the class of the popup element.

inputs.name: popupHeight
inputs.description: Sets the height of the popup element.

inputs.name: popupWidth
inputs.description: Sets the width of the popup element.

inputs.name: readonly
inputs.description: Sets the readonly state of the date picker.

inputs.name: readonlyInput
inputs.description: When true, the input is readonly but the calendar button remains enabled.

inputs.name: required
inputs.description:
Sets the required state of the date picker.
When bound to a signal form field via `[formField]`, this is written by the `FormField` directive.

inputs.name: rounded
inputs.description: Sets the border radius of the date picker.

inputs.name: showClearButton
inputs.description: Sets the visibility of the clear button.

inputs.name: size
inputs.description: Sets the size of the date picker.

inputs.name: touch
inputs.description:
Emitted when the date picker is interacted with via blur, selection, or clear.
The `FormField` directive listens to this to mark the field as touched.

inputs.name: touched
inputs.description:
Sets the touched state of the date picker. When bound to a signal form field via `[formField]`,
this is written by the `FormField` directive.

inputs.name: value
inputs.description: Two-way bindable current date value.

inputs.name: weekNumber
inputs.description: Enables the display of week numbers in the calendar.

inputs.name: close
inputs.description: Emits when the popup is about to close. This event is preventable.

inputs.name: closed
inputs.description: Emits after the popup is closed.

inputs.name: disabled
inputs.description: Sets the disabled state of the date time picker.

inputs.name: disabledDates
inputs.description:
Sets the disabled dates of the date time picker.
Accepts either an iterable of Date objects or a predicate function.

inputs.name: firstDay
inputs.description: Sets the first day of the week.

inputs.name: format
inputs.description: Sets the date format of the date time picker.

inputs.name: hourFormat
inputs.description: Sets the hour format of the time picker.

inputs.name: hourStep
inputs.description: Sets the hour step of the time picker.

inputs.name: invalid
inputs.description:
Marks the date time picker as invalid. When bound to a signal form field via `[formField]`,
this is written by the `FormField` directive.

inputs.name: max
inputs.description: Sets the maximum date of the date time picker.

inputs.name: min
inputs.description: Sets the minimum date of the date time picker.

inputs.name: minuteStep
inputs.description: Sets the minute step of the time picker.

inputs.name: open
inputs.description: Emits when the popup is about to open. This event is preventable.

inputs.name: opened
inputs.description: Emits after the popup is opened.

inputs.name: placeholder
inputs.description: Sets the placeholder of the date time picker.

inputs.name: popupClass
inputs.description: Sets the class of the popup element.

inputs.name: popupHeight
inputs.description: Sets the height of the popup element.

inputs.name: popupWidth
inputs.description: Sets the width of the popup element.

inputs.name: readonly
inputs.description: Sets the readonly state of the date time picker.

inputs.name: readonlyInput
inputs.description: When true, the input is readonly but the popup button remains enabled.

inputs.name: required
inputs.description:
Sets the required state of the date time picker.
When bound to a signal form field via `[formField]`, this is written by the `FormField` directive.

inputs.name: rounded
inputs.description: Sets the border radius of the date time picker.

inputs.name: secondStep
inputs.description: Sets the second step of the time picker.

inputs.name: showClearButton
inputs.description: Sets the visibility of the clear button.

inputs.name: showSeconds
inputs.description: Sets the visibility of the second selector.

inputs.name: size
inputs.description: Sets the size of the date time picker.

inputs.name: touch
inputs.description:
Emitted when the date time picker is interacted with via blur, selection, or clear.
The `FormField` directive listens to this to mark the field as touched.

inputs.name: touched
inputs.description:
Sets the touched state of the date time picker. When bound to a signal form field via `[formField]`,
this is written by the `FormField` directive.

inputs.name: value
inputs.description: Two-way bindable current date time value.

inputs.name: weekNumber
inputs.description: Enables the display of week numbers in the calendar.

inputs.name: close
inputs.description: Emits when the popup is about to close. This event is preventable.

inputs.name: closed
inputs.description: Emits after the popup is closed.

inputs.name: disabled
inputs.description: Sets the disabled state of the time picker.

inputs.name: format
inputs.description: Sets the format of the time picker.

inputs.name: hourFormat
inputs.description: Sets the hour format of the time picker.

inputs.name: hourStep
inputs.description: Sets the hour step of the time picker.

inputs.name: invalid
inputs.description:
Marks the time picker as invalid. When bound to a signal form field via `[formField]`,
this is written by the `FormField` directive.

inputs.name: max
inputs.description: Sets the maximum date of the time picker.

inputs.name: min
inputs.description: Sets the minimum date of the time picker.

inputs.name: minuteStep
inputs.description: Sets the minute step of the time picker.

inputs.name: open
inputs.description: Emits when the popup is about to open. This event is preventable.

inputs.name: opened
inputs.description: Emits after the popup is opened.

inputs.name: placeholder
inputs.description: Sets the placeholder of the time picker.

inputs.name: popupClass
inputs.description: Sets the class of the popup element.

inputs.name: popupHeight
inputs.description: Sets the height of the popup element.

inputs.name: popupWidth
inputs.description: Sets the width of the popup element.

inputs.name: readonly
inputs.description: Sets the readonly state of the time picker.

inputs.name: readonlyInput
inputs.description: When true, the input is readonly but the popup button remains enabled.

inputs.name: required
inputs.description:
Sets the required state of the time picker.
When bound to a signal form field via `[formField]`, this is written by the `FormField` directive.

inputs.name: rounded
inputs.description: Sets the border radius of the time picker.

inputs.name: secondStep
inputs.description: Sets the second step of the time picker.

inputs.name: showClearButton
inputs.description: Sets the visibility of the clear button.

inputs.name: showSeconds
inputs.description: Sets the visibility of the second selector.

inputs.name: size
inputs.description: Sets the size of the time picker.

inputs.name: touch
inputs.description:
Emitted when the time picker is interacted with via blur, selection, or clear.
The `FormField` directive listens to this to mark the field as touched.

inputs.name: touched
inputs.description:
Sets the touched state of the time picker. When bound to a signal form field via `[formField]`,
this is written by the `FormField` directive.

inputs.name: value
inputs.description: Two-way bindable current time value.

inputs.name: invalid
inputs.description:
Marks the time selector as invalid. When bound to a signal form field via `[formField]`,
this is written by the `FormField` directive.

inputs.name: readonly
inputs.description: Prevents value changes while preserving the component's visual state.

inputs.name: required
inputs.description:
Sets whether the time selector is required. When bound to a signal form field via `[formField]`,
this is written by the `FormField` directive.

inputs.name: touch
inputs.description:
Emitted when the time selector is interacted with via blur or value selection.
The `FormField` directive listens to this to mark the field as touched.

inputs.name: touched
inputs.description:
Sets the touched state of the time selector. When bound to a signal form field via `[formField]`,
this is written by the `FormField` directive.

inputs.name: value
inputs.description: Two-way bindable current time value.

inputs.name: closable
inputs.description: Sets the visibility of the close button in the window header.

inputs.name: close
inputs.description: Emits when the window is about to be closed.

inputs.name: closed
inputs.description: Emitted after the window has fully closed (post-animation). Preventing this event has no effect.

inputs.name: closeOnEscape
inputs.description: Sets whether the window should close when the escape key is pressed.

inputs.name: dragEnd
inputs.description: Emits when the window dragging ends.

inputs.name: dragStart
inputs.description: Emits when the window dragging starts.

inputs.name: draggable
inputs.description: Sets whether the window can be dragged by the user.

inputs.name: focusedElement
inputs.description:
Sets the element that should receive focus when the window is opened.
Accepts an element reference or a query selector string.

inputs.name: height
inputs.description: Sets the height of the window.

inputs.name: left
inputs.description: Sets the left position of the window.

inputs.name: look
inputs.description: Sets the look of the window.

inputs.name: maxHeight
inputs.description: Sets the maximum height of the window.

inputs.name: maxWidth
inputs.description: Sets the maximum width of the window.

inputs.name: maximizable
inputs.description: Sets whether the user can maximize the window.

inputs.name: minHeight
inputs.description: Sets the minimum height of the window.

inputs.name: minWidth
inputs.description: Sets the minimum width of the window.

inputs.name: minimizable
inputs.description: Sets whether the user can minimize the window.

inputs.name: modal
inputs.description: Sets whether the window should have an overlay behind it.

inputs.name: resizable
inputs.description: Sets whether the user can resize the window.

inputs.name: rounded
inputs.description: Sets the border radius of the window.

inputs.name: title
inputs.description: Sets the title of the window.

inputs.name: top
inputs.description: Sets the top position of the window.

inputs.name: width
inputs.description: Sets the width of the window.

inputs.name: allowCustomValue
inputs.description: Allows a custom value to be committed when it doesn't match any item in {@link data}.

inputs.name: ariaDescribedBy
inputs.description: ID of an element that provides an extended description for the input.

inputs.name: ariaLabel
inputs.description:
Accessible name for the input. Describe what the combo box represents.
Falls back to {@link placeholder} when neither this nor {@link ariaLabelledBy} is set.

inputs.name: ariaLabelledBy
inputs.description: ID of an external element that provides the accessible name for the input.

inputs.name: close
inputs.description: Emitted when the popup is about to close. This event is preventable.

inputs.name: closed
inputs.description: Emitted after the popup is closed.

inputs.name: data
inputs.description: Collection of items to render.

inputs.name: disabled
inputs.description: Renders the component with reduced visual emphasis and removes pointer interaction.

inputs.name: itemDisabled
inputs.description: A predicate function or the name of the field that determines whether an item is disabled.

inputs.name: invalid
inputs.description:
Marks the combo box as invalid. When bound to a signal form field via `[formField]`,
this is written by the `FormField` directive.

inputs.name: loading
inputs.description: Displays a loading indicator and prevents interaction while an operation is in progress.

inputs.name: open
inputs.description: Emitted when the popup is about to open. This event is preventable.

inputs.name: opened
inputs.description: Emitted after the popup is opened.

inputs.name: placeholder
inputs.description: Placeholder text shown when no value is selected or entered.

inputs.name: popupClass
inputs.description: Sets the class of the popup element.

inputs.name: popupHeight
inputs.description: Sets the height of the popup element.

inputs.name: popupWidth
inputs.description: Sets the width of the popup element.

inputs.name: readonly
inputs.description: Prevents value changes while preserving the component's visual state.

inputs.name: required
inputs.description: Sets the required state of the combo box component.

inputs.name: rounded
inputs.description: Border-radius preset applied to the component.

inputs.name: showClearButton
inputs.description: Displays a button that resets the value to empty when an item is selected.

inputs.name: size
inputs.description: Size preset controlling the component's dimensions.

inputs.name: textField
inputs.description:
Property name or accessor used to derive the display text from a data item.
If not set, the item itself is used as the text representation.

inputs.name: touch
inputs.description:
Emitted when the combo box is interacted with on blur, selection, clear, or committed input.
The `FormField` directive listens to this to mark the field as touched.

inputs.name: touched
inputs.description:
Sets the touched state of the combo box. When bound to a signal form field via `[formField]`,
this is written by the `FormField` directive.

inputs.name: userClass
inputs.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the host element via `tailwind-merge`.

inputs.name: valueAdd
inputs.description:
Emitted with the entered text when the user presses Enter on unmatched input.
Only emitted when {@link allowCustomValue} is true.

inputs.name: valueField
inputs.description:
Property name or accessor used to derive the value from a data item.
If not set, the item itself is used as the value representation.

inputs.name: value
inputs.description:
Two-way bindable current selected value. Implements `FormValueControl<TData | null>`,
enabling signal forms `[formField]` binding. When `valueField` is set, primitive field values can be
written into this model to restore a matching selected item.

inputs.name: ariaLabel
inputs.description:
Accessible name for the host element. Describe what the component represents.
When empty, falls back to the placeholder text.

inputs.name: ariaLabelledBy
inputs.description: ID of an external element that provides the accessible name for the host element.

inputs.name: close
inputs.description: Emitted when the popup is about to close. This event is preventable.

inputs.name: closed
inputs.description: Emitted after the popup closes.

inputs.name: data
inputs.description: Collection of items to render.

inputs.name: disabled
inputs.description: Renders the component with reduced visual emphasis and removes pointer interaction.

inputs.name: itemDisabled
inputs.description: Predicate or field name used to determine whether an individual item is disabled.

inputs.name: invalid
inputs.description: Marks the field as invalid. Set automatically by the `FormField` directive when bound via `[formField]`.

inputs.name: loading
inputs.description: Displays a loading indicator and prevents interaction while an operation is in progress.

inputs.name: open
inputs.description: Emitted when the popup is about to open. This event is preventable.

inputs.name: opened
inputs.description: Emitted after the popup opens.

inputs.name: placeholder
inputs.description: Placeholder text shown when no value is selected or entered.

inputs.name: popupClass
inputs.description: Additional CSS classes applied to the popup element.

inputs.name: popupHeight
inputs.description: Height of the popup element.

inputs.name: popupWidth
inputs.description: Width of the popup element.

inputs.name: readonly
inputs.description: Prevents value changes while preserving the component's visual state.

inputs.name: required
inputs.description: Marks the field as required for form validation.

inputs.name: rounded
inputs.description: Border-radius preset applied to the component.

inputs.name: showClearButton
inputs.description: Shows a clear button that resets the selected value when clicked.

inputs.name: size
inputs.description: Size preset controlling the component's dimensions.

inputs.name: textField
inputs.description:
Property name or accessor used to derive the display text from a data item.
If omitted, the item itself is used as the display text.

inputs.name: touch
inputs.description:
Emitted when the control is interacted with via blur, selection, or clear.
The `FormField` directive listens to this to mark the field as touched.

inputs.name: touched
inputs.description: Marks the control as touched. Set automatically by the `FormField` directive when bound via `[formField]`.

inputs.name: userClass
inputs.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the host element via `tailwind-merge`.

inputs.name: valueField
inputs.description:
Property name or accessor used to derive the value from a data item.
If omitted, the item itself is used as the value.

inputs.name: value
inputs.description:
Currently selected value, two-way bindable and compatible with Signal Forms via `[formField]`.
When `valueField` is set, this may hold the primitive field value instead of the full data item.

inputs.name: ariaLabel
inputs.description: Sets the aria-label attribute of the multi select component.

inputs.name: ariaLabelledBy
inputs.description: Sets the aria-labelledby attribute of the multi select component.

inputs.name: autoClose
inputs.description: Closes the popup automatically after an item is selected or deselected.

inputs.name: checkboxes
inputs.description: Renders a checkbox next to each item in the popup list to indicate its selected state.

inputs.name: close
inputs.description: Emits when the popup is about to close. This event is preventable.

inputs.name: closed
inputs.description: Emits after the popup is closed.

inputs.name: data
inputs.description: Collection of items rendered in the popup list.

inputs.name: disabled
inputs.description: Disables the component, preventing the popup from opening and blocking tag removal.

inputs.name: itemDisabled
inputs.description: A predicate function or the name of the field that determines whether an item is disabled.

inputs.name: invalid
inputs.description:
Marks the multi select as invalid. When bound to a signal form field via `[formField]`,
this is written by the `FormField` directive.

inputs.name: loading
inputs.description: Sets the loading state of the multi select component.

inputs.name: open
inputs.description: Emits when the popup is about to open. This event is preventable.

inputs.name: opened
inputs.description: Emits after the popup is opened.

inputs.name: popupClass
inputs.description: Sets the class of the popup element.

inputs.name: popupHeight
inputs.description: Sets the height of the popup element.

inputs.name: popupWidth
inputs.description: Sets the width of the popup element.

inputs.name: readonly
inputs.description: Sets the readonly state of the multi select component.

inputs.name: required
inputs.description: Sets the required state of the multi select component.

inputs.name: rounded
inputs.description: Sets the border radius of the multi select component.

inputs.name: showClearButton
inputs.description: Renders a button that clears all selected items when at least one item is selected.

inputs.name: size
inputs.description: The size of the multi select component.

inputs.name: textField
inputs.description:
Sets the text field of the multi select component.
It can be null, string, or a function that takes an item and returns a string.
If null, the item itself will be used as the text representation.

inputs.name: touch
inputs.description:
Emitted when the multi select is interacted with on blur, selection, remove, or clear.
The `FormField` directive listens to this to mark the field as touched.

inputs.name: touched
inputs.description:
Sets the touched state of the multi select. When bound to a signal form field via `[formField]`,
this is written by the `FormField` directive.

inputs.name: userClass
inputs.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the host element via `tailwind-merge`.

inputs.name: valueField
inputs.description:
Sets the value field of the multi select component.
It can be null, string, or a function that takes an item and returns a string.
If null, the item itself will be used as the value representation.

inputs.name: value
inputs.description:
Two-way bindable current selected values. Implements `FormValueControl<Iterable<TData>>`,
enabling signal forms `[formField]` binding. When `valueField` is set, primitive field values can be
written into this model to restore matching selected items.

inputs.name: checked
inputs.description: Whether the control is checked.

inputs.name: disabled
inputs.description: Renders the component with reduced visual emphasis and removes pointer interaction.

inputs.name: indeterminate
inputs.description: Activates indeterminate mode, showing a dash instead of a checkmark.

inputs.name: inputBlur
inputs.description: Emitted when the checkbox input loses focus.

inputs.name: inputChange
inputs.description: Emitted when the checkbox value changes.

inputs.name: inputFocus
inputs.description: Emitted when the checkbox input gains focus.

inputs.name: invalid
inputs.description:
Marks the checkbox as invalid. When bound to a signal form field via `[field]`,
this is written by the signal forms `Field` directive.

inputs.name: label
inputs.description: Text label displayed alongside the checkbox. When provided, takes precedence over projected content.

inputs.name: labelPosition
inputs.description: Position of the label relative to the checkbox.

inputs.name: labelSize
inputs.description: Controls the font size of the label text.

inputs.name: required
inputs.description: Marks the control as required for form validation.

inputs.name: rounded
inputs.description: Border-radius preset applied to the checkmark box.

inputs.name: tabIndex
inputs.description: Tab index of the native checkbox input.

inputs.name: touch
inputs.description: Emitted when the checkbox loses focus or its value changes.

inputs.name: touched
inputs.description:
Marks the checkbox as touched. When bound to a signal form field via `[field]`,
this is written by the signal forms `Field` directive.

inputs.name: userClass
inputs.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the label container via `tailwind-merge`.

inputs.name: columns
inputs.description:
The number of columns in the color palette grid.
Only applicable when using a custom palette.

inputs.name: disabled
inputs.description: Renders the component with reduced visual emphasis and removes pointer interaction.

inputs.name: invalid
inputs.description:
Marks the color palette as invalid. When bound to a signal form field via `[formField]`,
this is written by the `FormField` directive.

inputs.name: palette
inputs.description:
The palette to display — one of the built-in `"flat"`, `"material"`, or `"websafe"` schemes, or a
custom iterable of color strings. An empty custom palette falls back to the flat scheme.

inputs.name: readonly
inputs.description:
Prevents value changes while preserving the component's visual state. When bound to a signal
form field via `[formField]`, this is written by the `FormField` directive.

inputs.name: rounded
inputs.description: Border-radius preset applied to the color palette items.

inputs.name: required
inputs.description:
Sets whether the color palette is required. When bound to a signal form field via `[formField]`,
this is written by the `FormField` directive.

inputs.name: tileSize
inputs.description: The size of each tile in the color palette grid.

inputs.name: touch
inputs.description:
Emitted when the color palette is interacted with on blur or color selection.
The `FormField` directive listens to this to mark the field as touched.

inputs.name: touched
inputs.description:
Sets the touched state of the color palette. When bound to a signal form field via `[formField]`,
this is written by the `FormField` directive.

inputs.name: value
inputs.description: Two-way bindable current color value.

inputs.name: ariaLabel
inputs.description: ARIA label for the input.

inputs.name: decimals
inputs.description: Number of decimals to show.

inputs.name: disabled
inputs.description: Sets whether the input is disabled.

inputs.name: formatter
inputs.description: Formats the value to be displayed in the input when the input is not focused.

inputs.name: inputBlur
inputs.description: Emits when the inner input element is blurred.

inputs.name: inputFocus
inputs.description: Emits when the inner input element is focused.

inputs.name: inputFocusOut
inputs.description: Emits when the inner input element loses focus.

inputs.name: maxValue
inputs.description: Maximum value that can be entered.

inputs.name: minValue
inputs.description: Minimum value that can be entered.

inputs.name: nullable
inputs.description: Sets whether the input can be empty.

inputs.name: readonly
inputs.description: Sets whether the input is readonly.

inputs.name: required
inputs.description: Sets whether the input is required.

inputs.name: invalid
inputs.description:
Marks the numeric text box as invalid. When bound to a signal form field via `[formField]`,
this is written by the `FormField` directive.

inputs.name: rounded
inputs.description: Sets the border radius of the input.

inputs.name: size
inputs.description: Sets the size of the input.

inputs.name: spinners
inputs.description: Sets whether the spin buttons are visible.

inputs.name: step
inputs.description: Step value to increment or decrement the value.

inputs.name: tabindex
inputs.description: Tab index of the input.

inputs.name: touch
inputs.description:
Emitted when the numeric text box is interacted with on blur, value change, or spinner update.
The `FormField` directive listens to this to mark the field as touched.

inputs.name: touched
inputs.description:
Sets the touched state of the numeric text box. When bound to a signal form field via `[formField]`,
this is written by the `FormField` directive.

inputs.name: userClass
inputs.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the host element via `tailwind-merge`.

inputs.name: value
inputs.description: Two-way bindable current value of the numeric text box.

inputs.name: disabled
inputs.description: Sets the disabled state of the radio button.

inputs.name: inputBlur
inputs.description: Emits when the input loses focus.

inputs.name: inputClick
inputs.description: Emits when the input is clicked.

inputs.name: inputFocus
inputs.description: Emits when the input receives focus.

inputs.name: invalid
inputs.description:
Marks the radio button as invalid. When bound to a signal form field via `[field]`,
this is written by the signal forms `Field` directive.

inputs.name: label
inputs.description:
Text label displayed alongside the radio button.
When provided, takes precedence over projected content.
When empty, projected content inside `<mona-radio-button>` is used.
When both are absent, the radio button has no accessible name — always provide one.

inputs.name: labelPosition
inputs.description: Position of the label relative to the radio button circle.

inputs.name: labelSize
inputs.description: Font size applied to the label text.

inputs.name: name
inputs.description:
HTML `name` attribute forwarded to the native input.
Radio buttons that share the same `name` form a mutually exclusive group in the browser.

inputs.name: radioValue
inputs.description:
The identity value of this radio button within a group.
Compared against `value()` to determine whether this button is selected.
When this button is chosen, its `radioValue` is written to the form as the new group value.

inputs.name: rounded
inputs.description: Sets the border radius of the radio button circle and indicator.

inputs.name: userClass
inputs.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the label container element via `tailwind-merge`.

inputs.name: value
inputs.description:
The currently selected value in the radio group.
When bound via `[control]` (signal forms), the `Field` directive keeps this in sync with the form field.
When bound via `[(ngModel)]` or `[formControl]`, the CVA layer manages this value.

inputs.name: ariaLabelEnd
inputs.description: Accessible name for the upper-value (secondary) handle.

inputs.name: ariaLabelStart
inputs.description: Accessible name for the lower-value (primary) handle.

inputs.name: value
inputs.description:
Selected range as `[minimum, maximum]`.
Values outside `[minValue, maxValue]` are clamped; the tuple is always sorted, so index 0 ≤ index 1.

inputs.name: ariaValueText
inputs.description: Human-readable override for the `aria-valuenow` announcement. Pass a function that receives the current value and returns the string to announce.

inputs.name: disabled
inputs.description: Renders the component with reduced visual emphasis and removes pointer interaction.

inputs.name: handleClasses
inputs.description: Additional CSS classes to apply to the slider handle.

inputs.name: handleStyles
inputs.description: Additional inline styles to apply to the slider handle.

inputs.name: invalid
inputs.description: Marks the control as invalid for form validation purposes, reflecting `aria-invalid` on the handle element.

inputs.name: labelPosition
inputs.description: Position of the label relative to the component.

inputs.name: labelStep
inputs.description: Controls which tick labels are shown — only every n<sup>th</sup> label is rendered.

inputs.name: largeTickStep
inputs.description: Controls which ticks render at large size — only every n<sup>th</sup> tick is enlarged. Pass `null` to disable large ticks.

inputs.name: maxValue
inputs.description: Upper bound of the value range. Must be greater than `minValue`.

inputs.name: minValue
inputs.description: Lower bound of the value range.

inputs.name: orientation
inputs.description: Layout orientation of the component.

inputs.name: rounded
inputs.description: Border-radius preset applied to the slider handle.

inputs.name: selectionBackground
inputs.description: Background color of the filled selection area between the minimum and the current value. Accepts a CSS color string or a `CSSStyleDeclaration` partial.

inputs.name: shiftMultiplier
inputs.description: Multiplier applied to the step when the user holds Shift while pressing an arrow key.

inputs.name: showLabels
inputs.description: Displays value labels alongside tick marks. Only takes effect when `showTicks` is `true`.

inputs.name: showTicks
inputs.description: Displays tick marks at each step position along the track.

inputs.name: smallTickStep
inputs.description: Controls how many ticks are visible — only every n<sup>th</sup> tick is rendered.

inputs.name: step
inputs.description: Increment applied when the value changes via keyboard navigation.

inputs.name: touch
inputs.description: Emitted when the slider loses focus or its value changes via keyboard navigation.

inputs.name: trackBackground
inputs.description: Background color of the unfilled track portion. Accepts a CSS color string or a `CSSStyleDeclaration` partial.

inputs.name: trackSize
inputs.description: Width (vertical orientation) or height (horizontal orientation) of the track. Accepts a pixel number or any CSS length string.

inputs.name: ariaLabel
inputs.description:
Accessible name for the host element. Describe what the component represents.
When empty, assistive technology announces the role without a label.

inputs.name: ariaLabelledBy
inputs.description: ID of an external element that provides the accessible name for the host element.

inputs.name: value
inputs.description: Current value. Values outside `[minValue, maxValue]` are clamped before rendering.

inputs.name: ariaValueText
inputs.description: Human-readable override for the `aria-valuenow` announcement. Pass a function that receives the current value and returns the string to announce.

inputs.name: disabled
inputs.description: Renders the component with reduced visual emphasis and removes pointer interaction.

inputs.name: handleClasses
inputs.description: Additional CSS classes to apply to the slider handle.

inputs.name: handleStyles
inputs.description: Additional inline styles to apply to the slider handle.

inputs.name: labelStep

inputs.name: largeTickStep
inputs.description: Controls which ticks render at large size — only every n<sup>th</sup> tick is enlarged. Pass `null` to disable large ticks.

inputs.name: maxValue
inputs.description: Upper bound of the value range. Must be greater than `minValue`.

inputs.name: minValue
inputs.description: Lower bound of the value range.

inputs.name: orientation
inputs.description: Layout orientation of the component.

inputs.name: rounded
inputs.description: Border-radius preset applied to the slider handle.

inputs.name: selectionBackground
inputs.description: Background color of the filled selection area between the minimum and the current value. Accepts a CSS color string or a `CSSStyleDeclaration` partial.

inputs.name: shiftMultiplier
inputs.description: Multiplier applied to the step when the user holds Shift while pressing an arrow key.

inputs.name: showLabels
inputs.description: Displays value labels alongside tick marks. Only takes effect when `showTicks` is `true`.

inputs.name: showTicks
inputs.description: Displays tick marks at each step position along the track.

inputs.name: smallTickStep
inputs.description: Controls how many ticks are visible — only every n<sup>th</sup> tick is rendered.

inputs.name: step
inputs.description: Increment applied when the value changes via keyboard navigation.

inputs.name: touch
inputs.description: Emitted when the slider loses focus or its value changes via keyboard navigation.

inputs.name: trackBackground
inputs.description: Background color of the unfilled track portion. Accepts a CSS color string or a `CSSStyleDeclaration` partial.

inputs.name: trackSize
inputs.description: Width (vertical orientation) or height (horizontal orientation) of the track. Accepts a pixel number or any CSS length string.

inputs.name: touch

Accessible name for the host element. Describe what the component represents.
When empty, assistive technology announces the role without a label.

inputs.name: disabled
inputs.description: Renders the component with reduced visual emphasis and removes pointer interaction.

inputs.name: invalid
inputs.description:
Marks the switch as invalid. When bound to a signal form field via `[field]`,
this is written by the signal forms `Field` directive.

inputs.name: offLabel
inputs.description: Label displayed inside the switch track when it is in the off state.

inputs.name: onLabel
inputs.description: Label displayed inside the switch track when it is in the on state.

inputs.name: required
inputs.description: Marks the switch as required for form validation.

inputs.name: rounded
inputs.description: Border-radius preset applied to the component.

inputs.name: size
inputs.description: Size preset controlling the component's dimensions.

inputs.name: touch
inputs.description: Emitted when the switch loses focus or its value changes.

inputs.name: touched
inputs.description:
Marks the switch as touched. When bound to a signal form field via `[field]`,
this is written by the signal forms `Field` directive.

inputs.name: userClass
inputs.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the host element via `tailwind-merge`.

inputs.name: clearButton
inputs.description: Displays a clear button that resets the value to empty.

inputs.name: disabled
inputs.description: Renders the component with reduced visual emphasis and removes pointer interaction.

inputs.name: inputAttributes
inputs.description: Additional HTML attributes applied directly to the inner `<input>` element.

inputs.name: inputBlur
inputs.description: Emitted when the inner input loses focus.

inputs.name: inputFocus
inputs.description: Emitted when the inner input gains focus.

inputs.name: inputClass
inputs.description: Additional CSS classes applied to the inner `<input>` element.

inputs.name: inputStyle
inputs.description:
Inline styles applied to the inner `<input>` element.
Accepts a style string or a `CSSStyleDeclaration` partial.

inputs.name: invalid
inputs.description:
Marks the text box as invalid. When bound to a signal form field via `[formField]`,
this is written by the `FormField` directive.

inputs.name: placeholder
inputs.description: Placeholder text shown when no value has been entered.

inputs.name: readonly
inputs.description: Prevents value changes while preserving the component's visual state.

inputs.name: required
inputs.description:
Marks the text box as required.
Triggers the invalid state when the value is empty and the field has been touched.

inputs.name: rounded
inputs.description: Border-radius preset applied to the component.

inputs.name: size
inputs.description: Size preset controlling the component's dimensions.

inputs.name: touch
inputs.description:
Emitted when the text box is interacted with — on blur, value change, or clear.
The `FormField` directive listens to this to mark the field as touched.

inputs.name: touched
inputs.description:
Sets the touched state of the text box. When bound to a signal form field via `[formField]`,
this is written by the `FormField` directive.

inputs.name: type
inputs.description: Sets the `type` attribute of the inner `<input>` element.

inputs.name: userClass
inputs.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the host element via `tailwind-merge`.

inputs.name: value
inputs.description: Two-way bindable current value of the text box.

inputs.name: ariaLabel
inputs.description:
Accessible name for the breadcrumb navigation landmark.
Override when multiple breadcrumb components appear on the same page.

inputs.name: disabled
inputs.description: Renders the entire breadcrumb with reduced visual emphasis and removes pointer interaction from all items.

inputs.name: userClass
inputs.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the breadcrumb list via `tailwind-merge`.

inputs.name: disabled
inputs.description:
Renders this item with reduced visual emphasis and removes pointer interaction.
Has no visual effect when the parent breadcrumb is also disabled.

inputs.name: itemClick
inputs.description:
Emitted when the item is clicked or activated via keyboard.
Not emitted when this is the last (current-page) item or when the item is disabled.

inputs.name: animate
inputs.description:
Enables CSS transitions on stroke and color changes.
Set to `false` when updating `value` at a high frequency.

inputs.name: ariaLabel
inputs.description:
Accessible name for the host element. Describe what the component represents (e.g., "Upload progress").
When empty, assistive technology announces the role without a label.

inputs.name: ariaValueText
inputs.description:
Human-readable override for the `aria-valuenow` announcement.
Useful in indeterminate mode — set to a localized string such as `"Loading"`
so screen readers announce state rather than silence.
When empty, assistive technology falls back to the numeric value.

inputs.name: color
inputs.description:
Accent color. Pass a CSS color string, or a function receiving the current percentage (0–100) and
returning a string. When empty, falls back to the primary theme color.

inputs.name: disabled
inputs.description: Renders the component with reduced visual emphasis and removes pointer interaction.

inputs.name: indeterminate
inputs.description:
Activates indeterminate mode when the completion value is unknown.
ARIA value attributes are removed and `aria-busy` is set on the host element.

inputs.name: max
inputs.description: Upper bound of the value range. Must be greater than `min`.

inputs.name: min
inputs.description: Lower bound of the value range.

inputs.name: size
inputs.description: Diameter of the indicator in pixels. Controls both width and height of the host element.

inputs.name: thickness
inputs.description: Stroke width of the circular track in pixels.

inputs.name: userClass
inputs.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the host element via `tailwind-merge`.

inputs.name: value
inputs.description: Current progress value within `[min, max]`. Values outside the range are clamped before rendering; non-finite values are treated as `0`.

inputs.name: displayArrow
inputs.description: Display the arrow of the popover.

inputs.name: hide
inputs.description:
Emits when the popover is about to be closed.
This event is preventable.

inputs.name: hidden
inputs.description: Emits when the popover is hidden.

inputs.name: position
inputs.description: The position of the popover relative to the target element.

inputs.name: rounded
inputs.description: The border radius of the popover.

inputs.name: show
inputs.description:
Emits when the popover is about to be shown.
This event is preventable.

inputs.name: shown
inputs.description: Emits when the popover is shown.

inputs.name: target
inputs.description: The target element or ElementRef to which the popover is attached.

inputs.name: title
inputs.description: The title of the popover.

inputs.name: trigger
inputs.description:
The trigger that opens/closes the popover.
"click" toggles on click, "hover" opens on pointer enter and closes on
pointer leave, "none" disables automatic triggering (use `open()`/`close()`
instead). Any other DOM event name is also accepted and used as-is.

inputs.name: disabled
inputs.description: Whether the tooltip is disabled. When disabled, the tooltip will not be shown.

inputs.name: hidden
inputs.description: Emitted when the tooltip popup is hidden.

inputs.name: hideDelay
inputs.description: The delay in milliseconds before hiding the tooltip after the trigger event ends.

inputs.name: position
inputs.description: The position of the tooltip relative to the target element.

inputs.name: rounded
inputs.description: The border radius of the tooltip.

inputs.name: showDelay
inputs.description: The delay in milliseconds before showing the tooltip after the trigger event.

inputs.name: shown
inputs.description: Emitted when the tooltip popup is shown.

inputs.name: target
inputs.description:
The target element(s) to which the tooltip is attached.
Can be an Element, ElementRef, or CSS selector string.
